title: Cobblemon Frontier
description: Cobblemon server with an emphasis on story quests, tournaments, and cosmetics.
body:
# Welcome to Cobblemon Frontier
Where the thrill of survival meets the excitement of exploration in an adventure world! Here on our unique 'Surventure' server, we’ve blended the best of both worlds to offer you an unparalleled gaming experience.

Immerse yourself in a vibrant, ever-evolving world where survival skills are key to thriving and stories at every turn. Build your Cobblemon Team, scour the land for resources, and biuld your island, all while embarking on epic quests and learning more about the world.

Our custom server brings a fresh twist to traditional Cobblemon gameplay, allowing you to enjoy gameplay in both the Minecraft, Pokemon, and Adventure-styled experiences. Whether you’re battling fierce foes or teaming up with friends to conquer challenges, there’s always something new to discover.

Join our community and experience the perfect fusion of survival and adventure. Gear up, gather your allies, and get ready to explore a world where your skills and creativity are put to the ultimate test. Welcome to Cobblemon Frontiers—where every moment is a new adventure!


🛫 A Built Region to Explore
 
🏝️ Islands to Build Your Base
 
📘 Adventure Story and Quests
 
🐉 Original Pokemon and Forms
 
⚔️ Custom Dungeons 
 
🎩 Fresh Cosmetics

📛 Player Gym Leaders
